samples.title: The buzzer's whirr
samples.description: Consonant-rich natural speech · recommended for Phone signature view
samples.transcript: The buzzer's whirr triggered his muscles into complete relaxation.

samples.title: Sir, I exist
samples.transcript: A man said to the universe, sir, I exist.

samples.title: The raps at the door
samples.transcript: The little girl had been asleep, but she heard the raps and opened the door.

samples.title: One minute
samples.transcript: One minute, a voice said, and the time buzzer sounded.

samples.title: Oh no, I'm quite sure
samples.transcript: Oh no, I'm quite sure he didn't.

samples.title: The metal forest
samples.transcript: The metal forest is in the great domed cavern, the largest in all our dominions, replied Kaliko.

samples.title: An inexhaustible store
samples.description: Rare multi-piece lexical item · LibriSpeech dev-clean
samples.transcript: A red-haired mountain of a man with an apparently inexhaustible store of energy.

samples.title: Physically impossible
samples.transcript: This is physically impossible when conscious.
